title: Add llms.txt for AI-friendly crawling
notes: New/updated llms.txt at site root with language entry points, key sections, and sitemap.

title: Add llm.txt alias referenced by robots.txt
notes: robots.txt referenced /llm.txt; added llm.txt as an alias (same content as llms.txt) to avoid a broken reference.

title: Keep language switch on matching lesson
notes: Language switcher now links to the matching lesson in other languages using section+weight fallback instead of always sending users to the homepage.

title: Add home hero CTA to start the course
notes: Added localized CTA links in the homepage hero for CA/ES/EN so new visitors can jump straight into the lessons.

title: Improve post tag labels readability
notes: Post footer tags now render human-friendly labels by replacing hyphens with spaces and preserving uppercase acronyms like LLM and IA.

title: Improve taxonomy tag labels readability
notes: Taxonomy tag listings now reuse the human-friendly label formatter so slugs render with spaces and preserved acronyms like LLM.

title: Humanize term page headings
notes: Individual tag pages now render human-friendly visible headings instead of raw slug text with hyphens.

title: Humanize OG/Twitter titles on term pages
notes: Open Graph and Twitter card titles for tag/term pages now use human-friendly labels (no hyphenated slugs) and avoid duplicate meta tags.

title: Avoid duplicate hreflang; keep x-default on home
notes: Removed duplicate hreflang emission from extend_head (theme already outputs it) while keeping x-default on the homepage.

title: Default OG/Twitter descriptions for tag pages
notes: Add a sensible default OG/Twitter description for term/tag pages when they lack description/summary (localized ca/es/en).
